title: quoya loxocarpa
intro: Quoya loxocarpa, also known as Quoya or Quandong, is a native Australian plant species belonging to the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant's fruit, leaves, and roots are used in traditional medicine and are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quoya loxocarpa include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Quoya loxocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
